message:
## 🏆 New King of Distil SN97!

**UID 172** has dethroned **UID 7**

📊 **KL: 0.090636** (previous king scored 0.091634 last eval)
🤗 Model: [slowsnake/qwen35-4b-kd-v10](<https://huggingface.co/slowsnake/qwen35-4b-kd-v10>)
👑 Previous king: [aidonuts/corpulent-quail-step1000-v0](<https://huggingface.co/aidonuts/corpulent-quail-step1000-v0>)

💰 **Winner earns ~133.9 τ/day ($41,787/day)** — winner takes all!

Think you can beat **0.089730 KL** (1% epsilon)? Check the [mining guide](<https://github.com/unarbos/distil#mining-guide>) to get started.
